name: SeldonFrame
description: Build, deploy, and sell AI agents for local-service businesses from your IDE. build_workspace creates a live site + booking + CRM + AI receptionist in about 3 minutes; deploy, test, and sell agents through the same server.

authentication.instructions: Use the workspace token (wst_...) returned by workspace creation, or create a free workspace first - no signup required.

tools_summary: discover_tools / inspect_tool / run_tool - the full SeldonFrame build surface over one bridge
create_full_workspace - website + booking + intake + CRM + AI chatbot from business facts
deploy_agent - take a built agent live (phone/chat) with readiness checks
browse/sell - marketplace listing and earnings surfaces
